## CRYOFAST
### Democratizing access to sub-kelvin temperatures for quantum technologies
CRYOFAST will make it simpler and more convenient for researchers and developers to access the very low temperatures needed for the development of quantum technologies. 
As the quantum technology ecosystem grows, there is a clear need for professional testing and characterization services. CRYOFAST will address this need by providing a centralized facility for advanced cryogenic measurements on sensitive devices.
kiutra already has a state-of-the-art low-temperature characterization service, powered by cutting-edge cryostat hardware. We offer precise testing at an affordable rate, reducing test result times from weeks or months to just days. Our [Cryogenics as a Service](https://kiutra.com/cryogenics-as-a-service/) model also makes advanced testing accessible to startups, SMEs, and researchers who lack the capital or expertise to manage specialized low-temperature equipment.
The EIC Accelerator grant will enable us to expand our services to a broad range of companies in the quickly evolving quantum field. By providing integrated, rapid characterization and optimization services, we aim to accelerate the development of the first true commercial applications in the quantum space.
## EIC Accelerator
![EIC Accelerator March 2024 G](https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/EIC-Accelerator-Results-03.2024.png)
[The EIC Accelerator](https://eic.ec.europa.eu/eic-funding-opportunities/eic-accelerator_en#what-is-the-eic-accelerator-) is a funding program by the European Innovation Council (EIC). It supports start-ups and SMEs with innovative, game-changing products, services or business models with the potential to create new markets or disrupt existing ones, in Europe or globally. Eligible companies have the ambition and commitment to scale up. For this they are seeking substantial funding but face risks that are too high for private investors to take on alone. In addition to financial support, projects benefit from Business Acceleration Services. These services provide access to leading expertise, corporates, investors and ecosystem actors. Since the launch of the EIC in 2021, over twelve thousand start-ups have submitted ideas.
## CRYOFAST Objectives
### Empowering users with accessible, on-demand cryogenic testing
To meet the challenging demands of quantum technology development, current limitations of cryogenic solutions must be overcome. For end-users, this means getting past technical constraints that slow their R&D, while for kiutra’s customers, it’s about finding an economically viable and scalable solution that supports their commercialization ambitions. 
We see kiutra evolving beyond a provider of individual cooling systems to an integrated ecosystem of cryogenic solutions, with our Cryogenics as a Service (CaaS) model at its core. The service will transform quantum measurements by delivering unprecedented speed, automation and flexibility in cryogenic testing. 
Our aim is to reduce testing times from weeks to days, thereby accelerating R&D timelines with quick test result turnarounds.
We will provide a range of measurements for the characterization of sensitive quantum devices and components, handling all necessary interfacing of electronics and software. Using our proven routines and experience will ensure optimal efficiency.
By eliminating the need for expensive in-house cryogenic testing facilities and expertise, CaaS opens up access to advanced cryogenic testing for a broader range of users. This will help small and medium-sized firms and foster a more diverse quantum ecosystem across the EU and beyond.
What’s more, the flexibility of the service allows customers to scale their testing needs affordably, ensuring they can adapt as their requirements grow without the burden of maintaining complex equipment or specialized knowledge.
## CRYOFAST Impact
### Cutting carbon emissions through shared cryostats and green energy 
As our cryostats eliminate the need for helium-3, they address critical environmental and supply chain issues. Our novel CaaS solution represents a leap in cryogenic testing, addressing the profound limitations of existing options with a comprehensive service that creates new opportunities for customers and transforms the EU quantum technology ecosystem. 
Our cryogen-free technology provides a greener alternative to helium-based systems. Our L-Type Rapid cryostat saves GHG emissions by being energy-efficient and enabling faster testing with 6-10x better turnaround times. 
We have modeled the climate impact compared to cryogenic equipment on the market today.The speed advantage of our L-Type Rapid cryostat can reduce energy use by up to 70% for a quick test (∼1 hour of testing time at 100 mK). This not only reduces costs significantly but also cuts carbon emissions by up to 8.5 tCO2eq per year and device. By sharing cryostats among many CaaS users, we multiply this sustainability advantage dramatically. Further, our commitment to a CaaS test infrastructure running 100% on green electricity from hydropower plants cuts over 97% of CO2 emissions compared to the EU-28 electricity mix baseline in the use phase.
## Project updates
### March 2025
#### Showcasing CRYOFAST in the US
The APS Global Physics Summit in March was the perfect opportunity for us to promote our CRYOFAST project and to gain new insights into customer requirements.
We had many valuable conversations with leading scientists and researchers about their cryogenic challenges and requirements. These insights are essential as we continue working to democratize cryogenics through fast, flexible services.
To further understand current needs, we also ran a short survey on cryogenic applications – a process we’ll continue throughout the year.

<div class="wp-block-cover is-light" id="cryofast-intro"><span aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-cover__background has-white-background-color has-background-dim-100 has-background-dim"></span><div class="wp-block-cover__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-cover-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-group"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">CRYOFAST</h2>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Democratizing access to sub-kelvin temperatures for quantum technologies</h3>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:15%"></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:70%">
<p class="has-text-align-center wp-block-paragraph">CRYOFAST will make it simpler and more convenient for researchers and developers to access the very low temperatures needed for the development of quantum technologies. </p>



<p class="has-text-align-center wp-block-paragraph">As the quantum technology ecosystem grows, there is a clear need for professional testing and characterization services. CRYOFAST will address this need by providing a centralized facility for advanced cryogenic measurements on sensitive devices.</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center wp-block-paragraph">kiutra already has a state-of-the-art low-temperature characterization service, powered by cutting-edge cryostat hardware. We offer precise testing at an affordable rate, reducing test result times from weeks or months to just days. Our <a href="https://kiutra.com/cryogenics-as-a-service/">Cryogenics as a Service</a> model also makes advanced testing accessible to startups, SMEs, and researchers who lack the capital or expertise to manage specialized low-temperature equipment.</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center wp-block-paragraph">The EIC Accelerator grant will enable us to expand our services to a broad range of companies in the quickly evolving quantum field. By providing integrated, rapid characterization and optimization services, we aim to accelerate the development of the first true commercial applications in the quantum space.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:15%"></div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-cover" id="EIC-pathfinder"><span aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-cover__background has-black-background-color has-background-dim-100 has-background-dim"></span><div class="wp-block-cover__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-cover-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-group"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center" id="accelerator">EIC Accelerator</h2>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:50%">
<div style="height:5px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="991" height="557" src="https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/EIC-Accelerator-Results-03.2024.png" alt="EIC Accelerator March 2024 G" class="wp-image-9540" srcset="https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/EIC-Accelerator-Results-03.2024.png 991w, https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/EIC-Accelerator-Results-03.2024-300x169.png 300w, https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/EIC-Accelerator-Results-03.2024-768x432.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 991px) 100vw, 991px"></figure>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:50%">
<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-92258ecdf25722ded533622a23552552 wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://eic.ec.europa.eu/eic-funding-opportunities/eic-accelerator_en#what-is-the-eic-accelerator-">The EIC Accelerator</a> is a funding program by the European Innovation Council (EIC). It supports start-ups and SMEs with innovative, game-changing products, services or business models with the potential to create new markets or disrupt existing ones, in Europe or globally. Eligible companies have the ambition and commitment to scale up. For this they are seeking substantial funding but face risks that are too high for private investors to take on alone. In addition to financial support, projects benefit from Business Acceleration Services. These services provide access to leading expertise, corporates, investors and ecosystem actors. Since the launch of the EIC in 2021, over twelve thousand start-ups have submitted ideas.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-cover is-light" id="project"><span aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-cover__background has-white-background-color has-background-dim-100 has-background-dim"></span><div class="wp-block-cover__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-cover-is-layout-flow">
<div id="objectives" class="wp-block-group"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained">
<div style="height:20px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">CRYOFAST Objectives</h2>



<div style="height:20px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Empowering users with accessible, on-demand cryogenic testing</h3>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">To meet the challenging demands of quantum technology development, current limitations of cryogenic solutions must be overcome. For end-users, this means getting past technical constraints that slow their R&D, while for kiutra’s customers, it’s about finding an economically viable and scalable solution that supports their commercialization ambitions. </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We see kiutra evolving beyond a provider of individual cooling systems to an integrated ecosystem of cryogenic solutions, with our Cryogenics as a Service (CaaS) model at its core. The service will transform quantum measurements by delivering unprecedented speed, automation and flexibility in cryogenic testing. </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Our aim is to reduce testing times from weeks to days, thereby accelerating R&D timelines with quick test result turnarounds.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-bottom is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We will provide a range of measurements for the characterization of sensitive quantum devices and components, handling all necessary interfacing of electronics and software. Using our proven routines and experience will ensure optimal efficiency.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">By eliminating the need for expensive in-house cryogenic testing facilities and expertise, CaaS opens up access to advanced cryogenic testing for a broader range of users. This will help small and medium-sized firms and foster a more diverse quantum ecosystem across the EU and beyond.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">What’s more, the flexibility of the service allows customers to scale their testing needs affordably, ensuring they can adapt as their requirements grow without the burden of maintaining complex equipment or specialized knowledge.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div id="impact" class="wp-block-group"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left">CRYOFAST Impact</h2>



<div style="height:20px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Cutting carbon emissions through shared cryostats and green energy </h3>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">As our cryostats eliminate the need for helium-3, they address critical environmental and supply chain issues. Our novel CaaS solution represents a leap in cryogenic testing, addressing the profound limitations of existing options with a comprehensive service that creates new opportunities for customers and transforms the EU quantum technology ecosystem. </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Our cryogen-free technology provides a greener alternative to helium-based systems. Our L-Type Rapid cryostat saves GHG emissions by being energy-efficient and enabling faster testing with 6-10x better turnaround times. </p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-bottom is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We have modeled the climate impact compared to cryogenic equipment on the market today.The speed advantage of our L-Type Rapid cryostat can reduce energy use by up to 70% for a quick test (∼1 hour of testing time at 100 mK). This not only reduces costs significantly but also cuts carbon emissions by up to 8.5 tCO2eq per year and device. By sharing cryostats among many CaaS users, we multiply this sustainability advantage dramatically. Further, our commitment to a CaaS test infrastructure running 100% on green electricity from hydropower plants cuts over 97% of CO2 emissions compared to the EU-28 electricity mix baseline in the use phase.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>
</div></div>

<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-94320" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">March 2025</h3><div id="ac-94320" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h4 class="wp-block-heading">Showcasing CRYOFAST in the US</h4>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The APS Global Physics Summit in March was the perfect opportunity for us to promote our CRYOFAST project and to gain new insights into customer requirements.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We had many valuable conversations with leading scientists and researchers about their cryogenic challenges and requirements. These insights are essential as we continue working to democratize cryogenics through fast, flexible services.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">To further understand current needs, we also ran a short survey on cryogenic applications – a process we’ll continue throughout the year.</p>
</div>
